description: Checks whether expired time-sensitive facts stop influencing later answers.

timeline.user: For March proposals, we can mention discount code SPRING20.
SPRING20 is expired now. Do not use that code in new pricing notes.

timeline.query: Write a pricing follow-up for a new prospect.

evaluation.scoring_rubric: The answer should avoid expired discount codes and default to current pricing language.

expected_memories.description: SPRING20 is expired and should not be used for new pricing.

probe.command: SEARCH CONCEPT "SPRING20 expired do not use pricing" MODE "semantic" THRESHOLD 0.6 LIMIT 10

expected_memories.description: The expired code should not remain active for new prospects.

probe.command: FIND(?code) WHERE { ?code {type: "Discount"} FILTER(CONTAINS(?code.name, "SPRING20") || CONTAINS(?code.attributes.description, "SPRING20")) FILTER(IS_NULL(?code.metadata.expired) || ?code.metadata.expired != true) } LIMIT 10
